data.title: Polygon acquires Coinme and Sequence in $250M deal to strengthen stablecoin payments network for onchain transactions. CEO Boiron confirms.
data.description: During an interview with Cointelegraph, Marc Boiron, CEO of Polygon Labs, stated that the recent acquisitions were aimed at establishing the network as a compliant payments platform designed to facilitate the seamless transfer of stablecoins on the blockchain on a large scale.
NXGB (OTC: NXGB) updates on CAND Airdrop campaign and upcoming PancakeSwap BSC pair launch with final CAND bonus.

data.title: U.S. FDA grants Breakthrough Therapy Designation to Ipsen's IPN60340 for first line unfit Acute Myeloid Leukemia, targeting BTN3A.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Ipsen announced that the U.S. FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy Designation (BTD) for IPN60340, in conjunction with venetoclax and azacitidine (Ven-Aza), for first-line unfit acute myeloid leukemia, a severe blood cancer that commonly affects older adults. IPN60340 is a novel monoclonal antibody targeting BTN3A, a crucial immune-regulatory molecule found extensively in cancer cells. The BTD is aimed at accelerating the development and evaluation of drugs for severe or life-threatening conditions showing significant clinical enhancements. In July 2025, IPN60340 had received Orphan Drug Designations from both the U.S. FDA and the European Medicines Agency.

data.title: Firstsource Solutions Limited acquires TeleMedik, Puerto Rico-based tech solutions company, enhancing clinical capabilities.
data.description: Firstsource Solutions Limited, a prominent global provider of business management services and an RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group company, has disclosed its acquisition of TeleMedik, a Puerto Rico based company recognized for pioneering technological solutions. This strategic move aims to enhance Firstsource's clinical and utilization management services, as well as broaden its reach within the payer-provider network. The announcement comes as Firstsource's stock is listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE:FSL) and Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE:532809).

data.title: Oyster names new CEO, Hadi Moussa, to drive global employment growth. Founder Tony Jamous becomes Executive Chairman.
data.description: In San Francisco, Oyster®, a remote-first company that provides global employment solutions for distributed teams, has named Hadi Moussa as the new Chief Executive Officer. Hadi Moussa will be taking over from founder and current CEO Tony Jamous, who will transition into the position of Executive Chairman, concentrating on long-term vision and strategy for the company. This shift in leadership is aimed at propelling Oyster's growth and advancing its goal of promoting equality in global employment. This strategic move is expected to bolster the company's operations as it continues to expand its reach.

data.title: BlackRock Inc. notified Endeavour Mining of its interests in the company on Jan 13, 2026. Details undisclosed.
data.description: Endeavour Mining plc has disclosed that BlackRock Inc. notified the company of its interests as of 13 January 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses $93k amidst CLARITY Act delay, hitting new weekly highs. Will it sustain gains without ETF flows and retail interest surge?
data.description: Despite a setback in the CLARITY Act legislation by US lawmakers, Bitcoin surged to new weekly highs above $93,000. The question now is whether BTC can maintain these gains without a significant increase in ETF flows and retail investor interest.

data.title: Inventors create cocktail pick GARNISH MATE (OCM-1768) securing drink garnishes, hors d'oeuvres.êteкк100
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, two inventors from Placentia, California, introduced the GARNISH MATE, a new cocktail pick designed to hold drink garnishes and hors d'oeuvres securely. The innovative product serves as an enhanced replacement for traditional toothpicks, offering a more reliable option.

data.title: Stream Realty Partners sells three buildings totaling over 1 million sq ft of industrial space in Houston to NorthPoint Development.
data.description: NorthPoint Development has acquired more than 1 million square feet of Class A industrial space in Houston. Stream Realty Partners, a leading commercial real estate firm, recently finalized the sale of Empire West Buildings 1, 3, and 8 to NorthPoint Development. The transaction marks a significant investment in the industrial real estate market, highlighting the strong demand for high-quality properties in the area. This acquisition underscores NorthPoint Development's commitment to expanding its portfolio and presence in key markets.

RICK RIEDER IS PICKING UP Trump meets BlackRock’s Rick Rieder Thursday as a top Fed Chair contender. Rieder favors cutting rates to 3%, citing small business, housing, and labor pressures. His Kalshi odds jumped from 3% yesterday to 10% today.

data.title: i3 Broadband in Illinois earns Platinum award from CommunityVotes Rockford, chosen by residents.
data.description: i3 Broadband, a fiber-optic internet provider based in the Midwest, was recently awarded Platinum status by CommunityVotes Rockford. The program, which recognizes trusted local businesses, is based on resident voting. Winners are chosen solely through community involvement, with residents nominating and voting for businesses they find reputable. This award highlights i3 Broadband's outstanding service and reliability in the area.

data.title: COO Raghu Krishnaiah from University of Phoenix was featured on "Get Hired" podcast discussing upskilling in career development.
data.description: Raghu Krishnaiah, COO of University of Phoenix, appeared on host Andrew Seaman's podcast to talk about the significance of upskilling in advancing one's career. The episode, aired on Jan. 13, 2026, highlighted the importance of acquiring new skills for professional growth. University of Phoenix executive Krishnaiah shared insights on this topic as a guest on the "Get Hired" podcast.

data.title: Hexrate launches new tools to grow Instagram followers & engagement for brands and creators. PRAGUE, Jan. 13, 2026. #Instagram #Influencers #SMEs.
data.description: A renowned Instagram growth platform, Hexrate, based in Prague, revealed on Jan. 13, 2026, its latest tools aimed at aiding influencers and small to medium enterprises (SMEs) in enhancing their Instagram presence. The award-winning platform specializes in organic growth strategies, assisting brands and creators in boosting their follower count on the popular social media platform. The expansion of its growth-focused tools underlines Hexrate's commitment to providing effective solutions for enhancing online visibility.

data.title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway gains $1.6B from Google investment, securing his legacy for passing on IPO.
data.description: Warren Buffett, famously known as the "Oracle of Omaha," had long regretted missing out on investing in Google's IPO. However, he seems to have made up for it by overseeing Berkshire Hathaway's stake in Alphabet, Inc. growing by over $1.6 billion. This significant increase happened as Buffett prepares to pass on the CEO role to Greg Abel. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: RIIG Tech, Inc. partners with Alterbank to support growth. Collaboration aims to enhance services.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between RIIG Technology, Inc. and Alterbank with the aim of backing the bank's ongoing expansion. This venture, based in Charlottesville, Virginia, and Castries, Saint Lucia, signifies a significant step towards enhancing Alterbank's development.

data.title: SCIP partners with SiliconExpert for real-time supply chain data, offers continuous sync for traceability.
data.description: SCIP, the Supply Chain Intelligence Platform, has partnered with SiliconExpert, a top provider of component and supply chain data. Their collaboration aims to offer ongoing synchronization and enhancement of supplier and component information for SCIP’s clients. By integrating SiliconExpert’s real-time data capabilities, SCIP can now provide consistent monitoring of supply chains for improved traceability. This move is set to benefit SCIP’s customers by ensuring they have access to up-to-date and dependable information for their supply chain management.

data.title: Analyst upgrades data center stock, hitting buy point. Reflects growth potential in data center industry.
data.description: A stock analyst has raised their rating on a company's stock due to its potential growth in the data center industry. The stock has reached a buy point after the upgrade, prompting the analyst to recommend it as a good investment. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Alphabet's record high as Wall Street boosts Google target prices post AI Apple deal.
data.description: Alphabet, the parent company of Google, achieved a milestone by reaching its highest stock value ever, as several Wall Street firms increased their price projections for Google following a significant artificial intelligence partnership with Apple. The momentum of Google's stock continues to grow amidst this lucrative deal, with Wall Street firms raising their price targets accordingly.
